criteria.name: Python Core & Advanced Concepts
criteria.description: Demonstrates mastery of GIL, asyncio, generators, decorators, and memory management.

criteria.name: Database & ORM Design
criteria.description: Proficient in optimizing queries, schema design, and SQLAlchemy/Django ORM.

criteria.name: System Architecture & API Design
criteria.description: Designs clean REST/GraphQL APIs and scalable background worker pipelines.

criteria.name: Testing & Code Quality
criteria.description: Prioritizes pytest, unit/integration testing, CI/CD, and robust error handling.

criteria.name: React Hooks & State Management
criteria.description: Deep understanding of memoization, custom hooks, and state management (Zustand/Redux vs Context).

criteria.name: Core Web Vitals & Optimization
criteria.description: Knows how to optimize rendering, code-split, and fix CLS/FID/LCP issues.

criteria.name: CSS/Styling & UI Architecture
criteria.description: Experienced in CSS Modules, Tailwind CSS, or CSS-in-JS design systems.

criteria.name: Technical Leadership & Mentoring
criteria.description: Ability to guide architectural choices, review code, and mentor team members.

criteria.name: Product Strategy & Vision
criteria.description: Defines clear value propositions, targets right user segments, and aligns with business goals.

criteria.name: Data-Driven Prioritization
criteria.description: Uses frameworks like RICE/MoSCoW to prioritize backlog based on quantitative/qualitative data.

criteria.name: User Empathy & Research
criteria.description: Designs effective user interviews and usability tests to gather insights.

criteria.name: Agile Execution & Communication
criteria.description: Writes comprehensive PRDs and maps clear features with engineering and UX teams.

criteria.name: ML/DL Theory & Frameworks
criteria.description: Deep knowledge of optimization, loss functions, Transformers, and frameworks like PyTorch/TensorFlow.

criteria.name: Feature Engineering & Data Pipeline
criteria.description: Able to handle imbalanced datasets, process high-dimensional features, and construct robust pipelines.

criteria.name: Model Evaluation & Tuning
criteria.description: Adept at tuning hyperparameters and choosing appropriate metrics like F1-score or ROC-AUC.

criteria.name: MLOps & Model Deployment
criteria.description: Deploying models as microservices and monitoring for data/concept drift.

criteria.name: Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
criteria.description: Mastery of Terraform, declarative vs imperative paradigms, and infrastructure modularization.

criteria.name: Containerization & Orchestration
criteria.description: Expert in Docker isolation (cgroups/namespaces) and Kubernetes cluster operations.

criteria.name: CI/CD & Deployment Strategies
criteria.description: Implements automated blue-green, canary, or rolling updates using GitOps (ArgoCD/Flux).

criteria.name: Networking & Cloud Security
criteria.description: Configuring VPC, routing, reverse proxies (Nginx), DNS, and secure secrets management.
